response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, directly matching the required stack and responsibilities. His hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, testing frameworks, and open-source tooling demonstrates strong architectural and problem-solving skills. His education from ETH Zürich and extensive track record of shipping complex systems across industries make him a highly compelling candidate.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AWS
Proven track record in AI-agent development and developer tooling
Strong open-source contributions and testing/DevOps expertise (Docker, GitLab, CI/CD)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, though Node.js/TypeScript experience is strong
German language skill is only basic, which may affect collaboration in Berlin-based teams
Some roles include legacy tech (DLang, Ember.js) which may raise questions about modern stack focus
